segments.text:
COVID-19
CLS-N390 Vaccines: Science and Society

SARS-CoV-2
D iscovered in 2019
C oronavirus = proteins look like crown
Four coronaviruses cause normal cold-li ke respiratory illness
Same family as
SARS
MERS
F ound worldwide

Symptoms
Wide range of symptoms – 2-14 days after exposure
Fever or chills
Cough
Shortness of breath or difficulty breathing
Fatigue
Muscle or body aches
Headache
New loss of taste or smell
Sore throat
Congestion or runny nose
Nausea or vomiting
Diarrhea

Transmission
Spread from infected person’s mouth or nose in small liquid particles
Coughing
Sneezing
Speaking
Singing
Breathing
Surface survival limited to approximately 72 hours depending on surface

COVID-19 V accine Timeline
Sputnik V
Russian fast-tracked vaccine
8/20
12/20
7/20
2/21
mRNA vaccines
FDA appoves Moderna and Pfizer-BioNTech
Coronavac
Clinical trials begin at Moderna and Pfizer-BioNTech
China lauched clinical triaals of inactivated virus vaccine
Viral vector
FDA approves Johnson & Jonson Janssen vaccine

COMIRNATY - Pfizer-BioNTech
mRNA encoding viral spike glycoprotein of SARS-CoV-2
Approved for anyone 5 years and older
2 dose primary series, given 3-8 weeks apart
Booster recommended for most; some second booster
Does not contain
Eggs
Preservatives
Latex
Metals
Ingredients
Lipids (fats) help mRNA enter cells
Sugars and salts – stabilizers during manufacturing, freezing, shipping, and storing
Rare risk of myocarditis and pericarditis, mostly in males 12-39

Spikevax – Moderna
mRNA encoding viral spike glycoprotein of SARS-CoV-2
Approved for anyone 18 years and older
2 dose primary series, given 4-8 weeks apart
Booster recommended for most; some second booster
Does not contain
Eggs
Preservatives
Latex
Metals
Ingredients
Lipids (fats) help mRNA enter cells
Sugars, salts, acetic acid – stabilizers during manufacturing, freezing, shipping, and storing
Rare risk of myocarditis and pericarditis, mostly in males 12-39

Johnson & Johnson / Janssen COVID-19 Vaccine
Inactivated adenovirus containing stabilized variant of SARS-CoV-2 spike protein
Approved for anyone 18 years and older
1 dose given
Booster of mRNA vaccine recommended
Does not contain
Eggs
Preservatives
Latex
Metals
Ingredients
Sugars, salts, citric acid, ethanol – stabilizers during manufacturing, shipping, and storing
Risk of blood clots with low platelet count (thrombosis with thrombocytopenia syndrome – TTS) - 3.83 per million doses
